{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Kameira grafts
| introduced = ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Kameira grafts]] are used to make [[Champions]] superhuman.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c12">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
